title: AI System Impact Assessment
description: Organisation shall perform AI system impact assessments at planned intervals.

title: AI System Data Management
description: Organisation shall document AI system data lifecycle: collection, preparation, labelling, processing, distribution, retention.

title: AI System Lifecycle Information
description: Organisation shall document AI system lifecycle information enabling traceability.

title: AI System Monitoring & Review
description: Organisation shall monitor AI system performance and review effectiveness of AIMS controls.
